fields.title: Migrate status/ feature
fields.description:
Move status to tau/src/status/

## Source
- extensions/tau/src/status.ts

## Target
- extensions/tau/src/status/index.ts

## Changes
- Export initStatus(pi, state) function
- Keep /status command
- Keep StatusCard rendering
- Can access sandbox config via state (for future enhancement)

## DoD
- /status command shows OpenAI, Gemini CLI, Antigravity quotas
- StatusCard renders correctly
- Burn rate calculations work
fields.close_reason: Moved status into vertical slice (initStatus(pi, state))
